description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine openaccfile_2, and is implemented by a call to openaccfile_2. This API is used to open an existing ACC results file for displaying results on diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.1.0. openaccfile(nbaserate, ncntgrate, fperrate, szfilename)

parameters.name: nbaserate
parameters.description: Base case rating to use for results display. (input).

parameters.name: ncntgrate
parameters.description: Contingency case rating to use for results display. (input).

parameters.name: fperrate
parameters.description: Loading percentage to use for results display. (input).
